name: Three Layer Fudge
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Semi-Sweet Chocolate (1 generous cup, unmelted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/2 cup butter and baking chocolate together.
2. Blend in the sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla, egg, crushed graham crackers, flaked coconut, and nuts. Mix well with a spoon.
3. Transfer the mixture to an ungreased 11 1/2 x 7 1/2 x 1 1/2-inch pan; refrigerate until set.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together 1/4 cup butter, light cream, confectioners' sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Beat well.
5. Spread the mixture over the chocolate layer in the pan; chill.
6. Melt semi-sweet chocolate and Paramount crystals over hot, not boiling, water. Stir until smooth.
7. Spread the melted chocolate over the white filling; chill again.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares. Store in the refrigerator. Makes about 56 pieces.
